examples.title: Self-Attention Mechanism
examples.description: Computes attention scores between query and key vectors
examples.code:
FUNCTION scaled_dot_product_attention(Q, K, V):
    scores = matmul(Q, K.T) / sqrt(d_k)
    weights = softmax(scores)
    output = matmul(weights, V)
    RETURN output
examples.explanation: Computes attention weights by comparing queries with keys, then applies to values
